title: Crispy Fish Stir Fry
description: A Thai-inspired dish with crispy fish and a variety of vegetables.

ingredients.name: Stir-fry vegetables (such as bell peppers, carrots, and broccoli)

instructions: Heat the vegetable oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the fermented soybeans and cook for 1-2 minutes, until fragrant.
Add the crispy fried shallots and cook for another minute.
Add the Thai red curry paste and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the fish fillets and cook for 2-3 minutes per side, until cooked through.
Add the stir-fry vegetables and cook until they are tender-crisp.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
